page: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor, with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 1024 GB of RAM, providing 8.0 GB per core, and a massive 480 MB L3 cache. It includes 7559 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include any GPU hardware.

Benchmark data shows top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core scoring 144,593.74 and PassMark CPU scoring 132,394.2. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, reaching 10,642.11 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 655.3 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Database operations and Redis SET benchmarks also rank in the top tier, with Redis handling 209.67 million operations per second. Single-core performance is average, indicating that workloads must leverage parallel execution to maximize the server's capabilities.

Given its high resource density, the E128ds_v7 offers a consolidated hardware profile for enterprise workloads without requiring GPU acceleration. The combination of 1 TB of RAM, 7.5 TB of local storage, and advanced Intel vector and matrix extensions, such as AVX-512 and AMX, makes it highly efficient for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, multi-threaded data decompression, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 1024 GB of RAM. Operating on Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance features a 480 MB L3 cache, 7559 GB of local storage, and support for Premium Storage. It delivers top-tier multi-core performance and exceptional memory bandwidth, as demonstrated by a PassMark CPU score of 132,394.2 and uncached read speeds of 655.3 GB/sec. While single-core performance is average, its multi-threaded capabilities excel, with Redis SET operations reaching 209.67 million operations per second. Lacking a GPU, it relies on Intel AMX and AVX-512 extensions for accelerated vector and matrix math. This configuration is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and heavy multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage, designed for high-throughput database and multi-threaded enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128ds_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7559 GB local storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring 128 vCPUs, 1 TB RAM, and 7.5 TB local storage for enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 128 dedicated vCPUs and 64 physical cores
1024 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
7559 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth
Intel AMX and AVX-512 extensions for hardware-accelerated operations
Best suited for large-scale databases, Redis caching, and multi-threaded data processing
